title: Cursed Craft
description:
Some cursed items and creatures, bloody scythes, cursed philosopher's stones, strange monsters, you'll see here！
You can find some items and creatures with curses in this mod, such as stones full of magic and curses, pickaxes that are very wrong, strange m
body: You can find some items and creatures with curses in this mod, such as stones full of magic and curses, pickaxes that are very wrong, strange monsters, and you can download this if you want to play a mod with strange items! You'll find strange creatures and unsettling objects and tools!
